name: Infosys
overview: Infosys is a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting. One of the largest IT services companies in India.
hiringProcess: Infosys conducts online aptitude + coding test, followed by technical interview and HR round. Campus hiring is common.
eligibility: 60%+ in academics, no active backlogs. Open to all branches for some roles.
preparationTips: Focus on aptitude, basic DSA, SQL queries, and OOP concepts. Practice InfyTQ platform problems.
